MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Stanley Artap is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Vicente Arturo Soto is present.
Attorney Thomas V. Loran, III, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
